downloadPolicy.instruction: Hermes request execution must use fixed registered local endpoints. SuperGemma 26B is retired; do not download or select it during normal work.

developmentQualityPolicy.instruction: Every development request must select an agent team, retrieve DB-backed patterns/RAG, choose a model lane, design the layout and data contract first, then implement and verify with scripts.

qwen25Instruct.role: Stable default for general conversation, coding assistance, and agent task planning

qwen25Coder.role: Stable default for code-specialized implementation and review drafts

qwen35Candidate.role: Newer general/agent candidate; do not replace stable Qwen2.5 coder lanes without local benchmarks
qwen35Candidate.policy: Use only after exact model identity, quantization, serving support, and Carbonet task benchmarks are confirmed.

designSpecialist.role: KRDS, Carbonet admin design, layout, copy, theme token, and visual consistency support
designSpecialist.policy: No dedicated design model is active. Use DB-backed design/theme/RAG first; Gemma4 GPU only for translation/copy, Qwen40 for complex design judgment, Codex/scripts for implementation.

qwenMath.role: Math reasoning, formula checks, unit calculations, and numeric validation
qwenMath.preferredSeries: Qwen Math / Qwen2.5 Math Instruct GGUF

qwen3.policy: Do not select Qwen3 small models; remove qwen3-shadow artifacts from vLLM hosts.

lanes.allowedWork: GPU Gemma4 E4B handles only Korean/English translation, glossary normalization, product-name mapping, and short UI copy.
CPU 7B helper classifies normal Carbonet requests, summarizes logs, proposes candidate files, chooses compact context packs, and flags judge escalation.
CPU 7B helper produces bounded small drafts and Hermes watchdog feedback. Qwen40 remains the main implementation judge; Codex applies and verifies.
Mid-draft is mapped to CPU 7B by default. Qwen14 is disabled unless manually benchmarked; escalate complex work to Qwen40.
Complex design/layout/KRDS judgment uses Qwen40. Gemma4 GPU may support short copy/translation only.
Math reasoning, formula and unit checks, numeric validation, and calculation review before deterministic verification.
Candidate lane for Qwen3.5 9B general reasoning, agent planning, and local benchmark comparison before promotion.
Architecture judgment, risky implementation review, failure interpretation, and final correction.
Deterministic command execution, build/test/runtime evidence, and route probes.
